mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( post_id, target_type, reporter_id, reason_type, content, file_path, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{userId}, #{reasonType}, #{content}, #{filePath}, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.target_type AS targetType, r.post_id AS targetId, r.reporter_id AS userId, u.login_id AS reporterName, r.reason_type AS reasonType, r.content, r.file_path AS filePath, r.status, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM report r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.reporter_id = u.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
